allow: Bash(node -e "const d=require\(''''fs''''\).readFileSync\(''''/dev/stdin'''',''''utf8''''\); const j=JSON.parse\(d\); const m=j.cargoquery||[]; const tabs=[...new Set\(m.map\(x=>x.title.Tab\)\)]; console.log\(''''Total:'''',m.length,''''matches''''\); console.log\(''''Tabs:'''',tabs\);")

Bash(node -e "const d=require\(''fs''\).readFileSync\(''/tmp/lp_test.json'',''utf8''\); const j=JSON.parse\(d\); if\(j.error\){console.log\(''ERROR:'',j.error.code\);} else {const m=j.cargoquery||[]; const tabs=[...new Set\(m.map\(x=>x.title.Tab\)\)]; console.log\(''Total:'',m.length,''matches''\); console.log\(''Tabs:'',tabs\);}")

Bash(node -e "const d=require\(''fs''\).readFileSync\(process.env.TEMP+''/lp_test.json'',''utf8''\); const j=JSON.parse\(d\); if\(j.error\){console.log\(''ERROR:'',j.error.code\);} else {const m=j.cargoquery||[]; const tabs=[...new Set\(m.map\(x=>x.title.Tab\)\)]; console.log\(''Total:'',m.length,''matches''\); console.log\(''Tabs:'',tabs\);}")
